result.stdout:
Usage: dotnet-blob-to-csv [options]

Options:
  -l|--last <LAST>                ISO 8601 time duration, substracted from the
                                  current UTC time.
  -f|--from <FROM>                ISO 8601 date time in UTC, time can be
                                  omitted.
  -t|--to <TO>                    ISO 8601 date time in UTC, time can be
                                  omitted.
  -o|--output <OUTPUT_FILE_PATH>  Required. Output file path.
  -c|--container <CONTAINER>      Required. The name of the storage container.
  -p|--prefix <PREFIX>            The prefix (if any).
  -?|-h|--help                    Show help information

commands.payload:
Usage: dotnet-blob-to-csv [options]

Options:

                                  current UTC time.
  -f|--from <FROM>                ISO 8601 date time in UTC, time can be

  -t|--to <TO>                    ISO 8601 date time in UTC, time can be

  -o|--output <OUTPUT_FILE_PATH>  Required. Output file path.
  -c|--container <CONTAINER>      Required. The name of the storage container.
  -p|--prefix <PREFIX>            The prefix (if any).
  -?|-h|--help                    Show help information

options.description: Required. The name of the storage container.
ISO 8601 date time in UTC, time can be omitted.
